inputs.titre: Eugénie de Montijo Marries Napoléon III

reason: The image depicts a wedding scene that could be associated with Eugénie de Montijo and Napoléon III. The architecture, clothing and hairstyles are consistent with the period. However, the excessive number of candles and chandeliers seems exagerated, so I deduct some points. No modern items or fantastic elements are obviously visible. The overall atmosphere is consistent with the era, but the abundance of light sources is unusual for a time when lighting was expensive and produced a lot of smoke.
